summary: Mission v10.0 - Instagram Reels Style & Zéro Vide - ALL TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) Barre d'actions style Instagram à droite (reels-action-bar) with Like/Réserver buttons, (2) Profile overlay bas gauche (photo/nom/bio), (3) paddingTop 5px for zéro vide noir, (4) 3 icônes header alignées avec gap 16px (Langue, Loupe, Son), (5) API /api/partners/active returns 5 unique partners, (6) Gradient overlay for text readability, (7) object-fit: cover defined for native videos.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ PartnersCarousel.js L297-347: Barre d'actions style Instagram (reels-action-bar) - VERIFIED at X=1837 (right side)
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L303-324: Bouton Like (like-btn-*) with HeartIcon - VERIFIED clickable
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L327-346: Bouton Réserver (reserve-btn-*) - VERIFIED with pink #D91CD2 background
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L349-415: Profile overlay bas gauche (profile-overlay-*) - VERIFIED at X=36 (left side)
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L200-202: paddingTop 5px for zéro vide noir - VERIFIED exactly 5px
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L680-771: 3 icônes header (Langue, Loupe, Son) avec gap-4 (16px) - VERIFIED
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L241: object-fit: cover class on native video elements - VERIFIED in code
✅ PartnersCarousel.js L289-295: Gradient overlay for text readability - VERIFIED

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All visual and functional tests passed via Playwright

context_for_next_testing_agent: Mission v10.0 validated: Instagram Reels style UI with (1) Action bar right side (Like + Réserver), (2) Profile overlay bottom-left (photo + name + bio), (3) paddingTop 5px, (4) Header icons gap 16px, (5) 5 unique partners in API. All v10.0 features working correctly.
